decisionConsistency.justification: Pattern: event-driven. 5/10 sessions consistent. Session 2 did not follow event-driven pattern. Session 6 did not follow event-driven pattern. Session 8 did not follow event-driven pattern. Session 9 did not follow event-driven pattern. Session 12 did not follow event-driven pattern.

assumptionHandling.justification: Session 8 explicitly flagged the email-only assumption. Session 9 restructured preferences model for multi-channel. Session 9 implemented preference-based channel routing.

cumulativeRework.justification: 43/3356 lines reworked (1.3%, 34/50). 0/31 files churned (30/30). Late-session rework: 1.0% (15/20).

contextRecovery.justification: Avg context recovery: 58. Session 11: 41 (process:30 efficiency:9 ttfw:2). Session 12: 53 (process:30 efficiency:18 ttfw:5).

finalQuality.justification: Compiles. Tests: 240/240 pass (100%). 5/5 components verified in code. Only one adapter implements an interface. 7/7 components have test files. API consistency: 15/15 (naming=consistent, types=exported, methods=consistent).
